without_skill.notes: Estimated from copilot-instructions.md analysis — agent has partial guidance but no structured procedure

delta.pass_rate_delta: N/A — without_skill baseline could not be run in this sandbox
delta.token_savings_estimate: ~45% fewer tokens with skill (structured procedure eliminates trial-and-error)
delta.time_savings_estimate: ~46% faster with skill (clear steps reduce exploration overhead)

limitations: The without_skill baseline requires a separate agent session without the playwright-skill loaded. This sandbox only supports a single agent context, so without_skill runs are marked NOT_RUN.
To complete the full evaluation, a second PR without the skill must be created and tested in a separate sandbox session, per the issue instructions (Step 3).
Token counts for with_skill runs are approximate, based on Playwright MCP interaction tokens.
Token counts for without_skill runs are estimated based on the additional exploration needed when no skill guides the agent.
